# AP0110.ORG

> AP0110 builds Independent Internet (Web 4.0) — open-source mesh networking, decentralized protocols, and post-quantum security for user-owned internet infrastructure. We develop charitable technology initiatives including CalCompute, the Life Impact International (LII), and UN Digital Public Infrastructure partnerships with UNA-USA.

## About

AP0110.ORG is a technology organization advancing Web 4.0 — the next generation of internet infrastructure that is user-owned, decentralized, and resilient. Our work spans public AI computing policy (CalCompute / SB-53), global digital inclusion (LII), and UN multilateral digital development (UNA-USA).

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://ap0110.org/): AP0110 mission overview, programs, and Web 4.0 technology
- [CalCompute](https://ap0110.org/calcompute): California's public AI cloud computing cluster established by Senate Bill 53 (SB-53) — safe, ethical, equitable, and sustainable AI for public institutions
- [Documentation](https://ap0110.org/docs): Technical documentation for AP0110 technologies
- [Articles](https://ap0110.org/articles): Research and editorial articles on Web 4.0, digital public infrastructure, and technology policy

## Key Concepts

**Web 4.0 / Independent Internet**: A user-owned internet layer built on mesh networking, decentralized protocols, and post-quantum cryptography — enabling connectivity that is resilient to centralized control or failure.

**CalCompute**: California's public cloud computing cluster established by SB-53. Provides safe, ethical, equitable, and sustainable AI computing resources to California researchers and public institutions via the University of California system.

**Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI)**: Open, interoperable digital systems that governments build to serve all citizens.

**Life Impact International**:
